response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with genuine craftsmanship credentials (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the AI-native mindset. However, the resume shows limited evidence of deep Python expertise (a must-have) and the distributed/high-throughput systems experience is concentrated in one role (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, 2018-2020) with DLang rather than the target stack. Staff-level technical strategy and stakeholder leadership at scale are also underrepresented relative to the seniority bar.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq matches the AI-native baseline
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops)
Polyglot full-stack range with TypeScript/Node depth and some high-throughput exposure
concerns: Python is absent from listed skills and employment narrative — a must-have gap
Distributed high-throughput systems experience is thin and dated (primarily DLang at Sociomantic)
Limited explicit evidence of Staff-level technical strategy, on-call ownership, and cross-functional stakeholder leadership

key_factors.factor: Limited recent distributed high-throughput systems work
